channel.title: Dirty Laundry
channel.description: Latest releases from Dirty Laundry on Dropout.tv

item.title: Who Hooked Up with Someone They Met on the Plane?
item.description:
Team StarKid members Jon, Lauren, James, and Mariah drink coconut espresso martinis and rate their theater kid energy.

Duration: 47:42

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, jon matteson, lauren lopez, james tolbert, mariah casillas, team starkid

item.title: Algonquin
item.description:
Grant shows how to make a drink for intellectuals.

Duration: 02:22

Tags: Dirty Laundry, grant o'brien, drinking, alcohol, cocktails, DIY

item.title: Who Got Yelled at by a Real Housewife?
item.description:
Izzy, Emily, Danielle, and Siobhan drink algonquins and team up against each other.

Duration: 49:38

Tags: Dirty Laundry, lily du, grant o'brien, talk shows, competitions, drinking, never have i ever, embarrassing, terrible things, izzy roland, emily axford, danielle radford, siobhan thompson
